target_query: how to stake ethereum from home
meta_description: An overview of how to get started home staking your ETH
first_paragraph: Home staking is the act of running an Ethereum node connected to the internet and depositing 32 ETH to activate a validator, giving you the ability to participate directly in network consensus.
review_notes: FAQ section is visible, so missing_faq_schema was added.
Keep schema_types as extracted, but schema issue labels still assume no visible HowTo/FAQ schema.

first_paragraph: Staking pools are a collaborative approach to allow many with smaller amounts of ETH to obtain the 32 ETH required to activate a set of validator keys. Pooling functionality is not natively supported within the protocol, so solutions were built out separately to address this need.
headers: H2: Why stake with a pool?
review_notes: FAQ section is visible, so missing_faq_schema stays.
Meta description is present but still generic for the target query.

meta_description: Find the answers to most of the questions about Lido Protocol. Reach out on Discord to ask more questions
first_paragraph: Lido is the name of a family of open-source peer-to-system software tools deployed and functioning on the Ethereum blockchain network. The software enables users to mint transferable utility tokens, which receive rewards linked to the related validation activities of writing data to the blockchain, while the tokens can be used in other on-chain activities.
review_notes: Do not trust this draft row.
The page appears highly dynamic and the parser missed most of the structure.
Replace this candidate with a more stable page before adding it to the benchmark.

title_tag: Ethereum Liquid Staking Guide: Lido, Rocket Pool, & More
meta_description: A detailed guide to how liquid staking works on Ethereum and a breakdown of the main liquid staking operators currently in the space.
h1: A Guide to Ethereum Liquid Staking
first_paragraph: With the Shanghai upgrade for Ethereum set to take place in April, the ability to withdraw staked ETH will also become available. As the upgrade approaches, interest in liquid staking protocols has risen, with many community members wanting to know how the industry will adapt.
headers: H2: How Liquid Staking Makes Staking Accessible
H3: The Benefits of Liquid Staking
H3: The Drawbacks of Liquid Staking
H2: Liquid Staking Options for Stakers
H2: Liquid Staking Options for Node Operators

title_tag: Ethereum staking: How does it work?
meta_description: An overview of Ethereum staking: the risks, rewards, requirements, and where to do it.
first_paragraph: Any user with any amount of ETH can help secure the network and earn rewards in the process.
headers: H2: Earn rewards while securing Ethereum
H2: How to stake your ETH
